final_cover_notes: Final inspected cover uses source-backed Aqara Door and Window Sensor P2, Presence Multi-Sensor FP300, and Climate Sensor W100 imagery in a clean residential shelf scene. No embedded article title, no decorative orbs, no progress bars or bar-like decorative trims, no network/routing overlays, no translucent panels, no inset frames, and no floating UI cards.
summary: Decide when Aqara P2, FP300, and W100 devices can pair directly to Home Assistant, when an Aqara hub helps, and which Matter path to use.
title: Can You Use Aqara Matter-over-Thread Devices With Home Assistant Without an Aqara Hub?
